recent_lines: My Garmin has seen things I'm not proud of.
I own four bikes and have a favourite parking spot at the café.
Why do I always pick the hilly route when my legs are already cooked?
the group ride was "easy pace" — apparently that's relative.
Packed my kit at 6am. Still in the kitchen at 7:15.
Nobody told me "café stop" meant 45 minutes and a second pastry.
The climb looked shorter on Komoot.
three bikes suitable for today. I'm taking the heavy one again.
